books.title: The Kingdom Releases
books.description: Join Ellie, Giraffy, Stripes, and Hippo as they discover God's plan for the Kingdom! Perfect for ages 4–8.

books.title: Preview of Kingdom Kids
books.description: A free sampler featuring the first chapter of each Kingdom Kids adventure. Great for new families!

books.title: Into the Wild
books.description: The explorers venture deeper into the jungle, uncovering Bible stories about courage and trust.

books.title: Rivers of Life
books.description: A journey through water-themed Bible miracles — the Nile, the Jordan, the Sea of Galilee.
